trigger.name: Storage: Failed to fetch data (or no data for {$PVE.NODATA_TIMEOUT})
trigger.description: Zabbix has not received data for items for the last {$PVE.NODATA_TIMEOUT}.

trigger.name: VM: Failed to fetch data (or no data for {$PVE.NODATA_TIMEOUT})
trigger.description: Zabbix has not received data for items for the last {$PVE.NODATA_TIMEOUT}.

trigger_prototype.name: LXC [{#NAME}]: High CPU utilization (over {$PVE.CPU.PUSE.MAX.WARN:"{#ID}"}% for {$PVE.CPU.PUSE.MAX.TIME:"{#ID}"})
trigger_prototype.description: CPU utilization is too high. The system might be slow to respond.

item_prototype.name: LXC [{#NAME}]: Uptime
item_prototype.description: System uptime in 'N days, hh:mm:ss' format.

filter.formula: (A and B) and (C and D) and E

trigger_prototype.name: VM [{#NAME}]: High CPU utilization (over {$PVE.CPU.PUSE.MAX.WARN:"{#ID}"}% for {$PVE.CPU.PUSE.MAX.TIME:"{#ID}"})
trigger_prototype.description: CPU utilization is too high. The system might be slow to respond.

item_prototype.name: VM [{#NAME}]: Uptime
item_prototype.description: System uptime in 'N days, hh:mm:ss' format.

macro.description: Filter of discoverable lxc vm by id
Filter to exclude discovered lxc vm by id
Filter of discoverable lxc vm by name
Filter to exclude discovered lxc vm by name
Filter of offline lxc vm by id
Filter of offline lxc vm by name
Filter of discoverable qemu vm by id
Filter to exclude discovered qemu vm by id
Filter of discoverable qemu vm by name
Filter to exclude discovered qemu vm by name
Critical minimum free storage space in percentage.
Warning minimum free storage space in percentage.
Maximum used storage space in percentage.
Filter of discoverable storage by name
Filter to exclude discovered storage by name
Maximum used swap space in percentage.
